inputs.name: in
inputs.label: Text Input
inputs.description: Text to match, extract from, or apply replacements to.

inputs.name: pattern
inputs.label: Pattern Override
inputs.description: Regex pattern to use instead of the configured one.

outputs.name: out
outputs.label: Result
outputs.description: First match (extract mode) or replaced text (replace mode).

outputs.name: matches
outputs.label: All Matches
outputs.description: Array of all matches found (when 'Return All Matches' is on).

outputs.name: matched
outputs.label: Did Match
outputs.description: True if at least one match was found, false otherwise.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: Error
outputs.description: Error message if the regex pattern was invalid.
